topics.topic_ar: طرق تخصيص مساحة القرص (المتجاورة، المتصلة، المفهرسة)
topics.query_en: Operating Systems file allocation methods contiguous linked indexed explained
topics.query_ar: شرح طرق تخصيص الملفات نظم تشغيل allocation methods
topics.reason: Students struggle to calculate disk block pointers and understand the complex trade-offs between external fragmentation and direct access performance.

topics.topic_en: In-Memory File System Structures and Open File Tables
topics.topic_ar: هياكل نظام الملفات في الذاكرة وجداول الملفات المفتوحة
topics.query_en: In-memory file system structures per-process system-wide open file table
topics.query_ar: شرح in-memory file system structures نظم تشغيل
topics.reason: Visualizing the complex pointer mapping between per-process tables, system-wide tables, and vnodes requires a deep understanding of memory and process management.

topics.query_en: File system layers architecture operating systems tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح طبقات نظام الملفات file system layers نظم تشغيل
topics.reason: The high level of abstraction makes it difficult to trace how a simple logical read/write request translates down through multiple modules to physical disk I/O.

topics.topic_en: Directory Implementation (Linear Lists vs Hash Tables)
topics.topic_ar: تنفيذ الدليل (القوائم الخطية مقابل جداول التجزئة)
topics.query_en: Directory implementation linear list hash table operating systems
topics.reason: Applying standard data structures like hash tables to disk-based directory management introduces confusing caching, block allocation, and collision resolution challenges.

topics.topic_en: File Locking Mechanisms (Shared, Exclusive, Advisory, Mandatory)
topics.topic_ar: آليات قفل الملفات (المشترك، الحصري، الإرشادي، الإلزامي)
topics.query_en: File locking shared exclusive advisory mandatory operating systems
topics.reason: Understanding how the OS handles concurrent file access and synchronization without causing deadlocks or data corruption is conceptually demanding.
